title: iberis linifolia subsp. intermedia
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. intermedia, also known as intermediate rock cress, is a subspecies of Iberis linifolia, a flowering plant in the mustard family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as skin infections and wounds. The health benefits of Iberis linifolia subsp. intermedia include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
